summary: Airflow DAG listing now sends the paused query parameter only when the paused flag is explicitly set.
reason: Review identified that a default paused=false parameter can hide paused DAGs from an ordinary dags list request. The command now omits paused by default and preserves explicit --paused=false when a user asks for unpaused DAGs.
validated_outcome: Focused regression test passed: go test ./internal/cli -run TestDagsListPausedQueryParamOnlyWhenFlagChanged -count=1.
